CustomField.description: Indicator whether candidate has completed either full or fast registration
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(NOT(ISNULL(Application_Completed_Date__c)), Compliance_Status__c = "Compliant", Compliance_Status__c = "Partial Compliant", AND(ISPICKVAL(Registration_Type__c, "Fast Registration"), ISPICKVAL(Registration_Status__c, "Compliance")) ), TRUE, FALSE)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicator whether candidate has completed either full or fast registration
CustomField.label: Registration Finished
